breakout_products.title: Dune
breakout_products.content: Context-aware Mac keypad to automate workflows + meetings. Dune is a Context-aware Keypad for Mac that sits next to your keyboard and changes what its three keys do in real time based on the app running in the foreground. Built for developers who live in GitHub, VS Code, Claude, Openclaw, and for anyone running AI agents or in back to back meetings on Zoom, Teams, and Google Meet. Product categories: Meeting software.

breakout_products.title: The New Waydev
breakout_products.content: Measure the full AI SDLC. From token to production. Waydev is the measurement layer for AI-written code. We track AI adoption, AI impact, and AI ROI across the full SDLC — from the first token consumed to the line shipped in production. Nine years building engineering intelligence. YC W21. Fortune 500. Product categories: Engineering & Development, Data analysis tools, AI Coding Agents.

breakout_products.title: Pegasus 1.5 by TwelveLabs
breakout_products.content: AI model for transforming video into Time-Based Metadata. AI that truly understands video. Uses multimodal models (Marengo/Pegasus) to search, analyze & generate text from video content at scale. Product categories: Data analysis tools, AI Infrastructure Tools.

breakout_products.title: Granter
breakout_products.content: Your company's AI Grant Consultant. Granter is the world's first AI Grant Consultant, built to make public funding fast and accessible for every business. No more chasing deadlines or decoding bureaucratic language. Our AI agent finds the right grants, writes competitive applications, and manages compliance post-approval. The digital employee for your full grant lifecycle. Product categories: LLMs, AI Chatbots, Fundraising resources.
key_points: Granter is the world's first AI Grant Consultant, built to make public funding fast and accessible for every business.

breakout_products.title: Knowzilla
breakout_products.content: Real-time AI for sales that guides every deal. Knowzilla gives sales teams real-time answers during live calls, so they can handle tough questions, overcome objections, and stop losing deals because the answer was buried in a playbook. Product categories: AI sales tools.

breakout_products.title: Makko AI
breakout_products.content: Make 2D game art and playable games. No drawing. No coding. Makko is an AI-powered 2D game studio. Start with concept art, create characters, backgrounds, and animations that all match in style, then build a playable game with your own art in Code Studio. No drawing skills. No coding. Just describe what you want and AI builds it. Collections keep every asset visually consistent across your whole game. Free to start. Product categories: AI Generative Media.

image_video.title: 前小鹏汽车自动驾驶一号位李力耘出任众擎CTO，加速打造具身大脑
image_video.content: 通过将自动驾驶领域成熟的“工业化AI”打法、高效的数据飞轮与极强的工程部署能力引入具身赛道，众擎加速打造原生多模态驱动、大小脑与神经末梢协同的全集成架构。
image_video.summary: 通过将自动驾驶领域成熟的“工业化AI”打法、高效的数据飞轮与极强的工程部署能力引入具身赛道，众擎加速打造原生多模态驱动、大小脑与神经末梢协同的全集成架构。.
